import re, unicodedata

def normalize_ar(s):
    if not isinstance(s, str):
        return ""
    # Normalize Unicode form
    s = unicodedata.normalize("NFKC", s)
    # Remove tatweel
    s = s.replace("ـ", "")
    # Remove diacritics (harakat)
    harakat = "".join([
        "\u064B", "\u064C", "\u064D", "\u064E", "\u064F", "\u0650",
        "\u0651", "\u0652", "\u0653", "\u0654", "\u0655", "\u0670",
        "\u0656", "\u0657", "\u0658", "\u0659", "\u065A", "\u065B",
        "\u065C", "\u065D", "\u065E", "\u06D6", "\u06D7", "\u06D8",
        "\u06D9", "\u06DA", "\u06DB", "\u06DC", "\u06DF", "\u06E0",
        "\u06E1", "\u06E2", "\u06E3", "\u06E4", "\u06E5", "\u06E6",
        "\u06E7", "\u06E8", "\u06E9", "\u06EA", "\u06EB", "\u06EC", "\u06ED"
    ])
    s = "".join(ch for ch in s if ch not in harakat)
    # Remove punctuation and symbols (Arabic and English)
    s = re.sub(r"[^\w\s\u0600-\u06FF]", " ", s)
    # Normalize hamza variants
    s = s.replace("أ", "ا").replace("إ", "ا").replace("آ", "ا")
    s = s.replace("ؤ", "و").replace("ئ", "ي").replace("ة", "ه")
    # Lowercase: Arabic letters don't have case; just strip spaces
    s = re.sub(r"\s+", " ", s).strip()
    return s

def token_set_ratio(a, b):
    a_norm = normalize_ar(a)
    b_norm = normalize_ar(b)
    a_tokens = set(a_norm.split())
    b_tokens = set(b_norm.split())
    if not a_tokens and not b_tokens:
        return 1.0
    inter = len(a_tokens & b_tokens)
    precision = inter / len(a_tokens) if a_tokens else 0
    recall = inter / len(b_tokens) if b_tokens else 0
    if precision + recall == 0:
        f1 = 0.0
    else:
        f1 = 2 * precision * recall / (precision + recall)
    return f1

def lcs_ratio(a, b):
    a_norm = normalize_ar(a)
    b_norm = normalize_ar(b)
    sm = difflib.SequenceMatcher(None, a_norm, b_norm)
    # Ratio approximates similarity; but we'll compute longest matching blocks length over length of longer
    # However SequenceMatcher ratio includes operations; we implement LCS length simpler?
    lcs_len = 0
    for block in sm.get_matching_blocks():
        lcs_len += block.size
    # matching_blocks includes a dummy block; remove last block's zero
    lcs_len = max(0, lcs_len - 0)  # Actually matching blocks includes zero sized at end; but sum includes; smh
    # Let's compute ratio as 2*lcs_len/(len(a_norm)+len(b_norm))? We'll compute using difflib ratio directly
    ratio = sm.ratio()
    return ratio

def robust_similarity(a, b):
    # Combine token F1 and difflib ratio
    f1 = token_set_ratio(a, b)
    ratio = lcs_ratio(a, b)
    return max(f1, ratio)

original_full = "وَتَقَرَّبُوا إِلَى اللَّهِ بِالْعِلْمِ وَالْعِبَادَةِ وَالْمَجْهُدِ فِي سَبِيلِ اللَّهِ وَتَقَرَّبُوا إِلَى اللَّهِ وَأَنْتُمْ تُسَارِعُونَ إِلَى الْخَيْرِ"
snippet = "وَتَقَرَّب... الْخَيْرِ"
original_full, normalize_ar(original_full)[:200], token_set_ratio(original_full, original_full), lcs_ratio(original_full, original_full)

def search_quran_substring(sub):
    sub_norm = normalize_ar(sub)
    hits = []
    for rec in qdb:
        text = rec["ayah_text"]
        text_norm = normalize_ar(text)
        if sub_norm in text_norm:
            hits.append(rec)
    return hits

# Try searching "تسارعون الى الخير"
search_quran_substring("تسارعون الى الخير")[:5]

# search "يسارعون في الخيرات"
len(search_quran_substring("يسارعون في الخيرات")), search_quran_substring("يسارعون في الخيرات")[:3]

# Search "ابتغوا اليه الوسيلة"
search_quran_substring("ابتغوا اليه الوسيله")

# Find Al-Hajj surah id
[s for s in qdb if s["surah_name"]=="الحج" and s["ayah_id"]==77][:3]

orig = original_full
cand_text = candidate_22_77["ayah_text"]
token_set_ratio(orig, cand_text), lcs_ratio(orig, cand_text), robust_similarity(orig, cand_text)

candidate_5_35 = [s for s in qdb if s["surah_id"]==5 and s["ayah_id"]==35][0]
token_set_ratio(orig, candidate_5_35["ayah_text"]), lcs_ratio(orig, candidate_5_35["ayah_text"]), robust_similarity(orig, candidate_5_35["ayah_text"]), candidate_5_35

candidate_3_133 = [s for s in qdb if s["surah_id"]==3 and s["ayah_id"]==133][0]
robust_similarity(orig, candidate_3_133["ayah_text"]), candidate_3_133

candidates_isari3 = [(rec["surah_id"], rec["ayah_id"], rec["ayah_text"], robust_similarity(orig, rec["ayah_text"])) for rec in qdb if normalize_ar("يسارعون في الخيرات") in normalize_ar(rec["ayah_text"])]
candidates_isari3

combined = candidate_5_35["ayah_text"] + " " + candidate_22_77["ayah_text"]
robust_similarity(orig, combined), token_set_ratio(orig, combined), lcs_ratio(orig, combined)
